meta.name: LLMOps Platforms & Workflow Automation Almanac Roster
meta.research_method: 8-facet wide exploration, 112+ independent searches, 8 parallel agents

tools.name: Dify
tools.notes: 142K stars; visual workflow, RAG, Agent; most-starred OSS; commercial restrictions on multi-tenant SaaS

tools.name: Flowise
tools.notes: 54.9K stars; drag-and-drop LLM flows; LangChain-native; self-hostable; owned by Workday

tools.name: n8n
tools.notes: 188K stars; 400+ integrations, AI agent nodes; self-hostable; Germany-based; EU-friendly

tools.name: Vellum
tools.notes: McKinsey, Coframe; experimentation, evaluation, deployment; A/B testing; SOC 2; 99.998% uptime

tools.name: PromptLayer
tools.notes: Prompt engineering; collaboration, testing, evaluation; no-code editor for non-technical

tools.name: Pezzo
tools.notes: Developer-first; prompt design, version management, troubleshooting; two lines of code

tools.name: Braintrust
tools.notes: Notion, Stripe, Vercel; evaluation-driven development; Loop AI agent; 13+ integrations

tools.name: Zapier
tools.notes: 7,000+ app integrations; no-code automation; AI steps, Zapier Agents, Tables, Interfaces

tools.name: Make
tools.notes: 1,000+ integrations; visual canvas builder; filters, routers, iterators; error handling first-class

tools.name: Gumloop
tools.notes: ~$60M funding; 130+ nodes; multi-model routing; Skills for agents; YC-backed

tools.name: CrewAI
tools.notes: Python-based; multi-agent collaboration; custom pricing; agent teamwork simulation

tools.name: AutoGen
tools.notes: Microsoft Research; autonomous task execution; self-prompting; maintenance mode as of 2026

tools.name: LangChain
tools.notes: 134K stars; 1,000+ pre-built integrations; building applications with LLMs

tools.name: LangGraph
tools.notes: LangChain ecosystem; stateful, cyclic multi-agent orchestration; Deep Agents for long-running

tools.name: LlamaIndex
tools.notes: Broad adoption; connecting LLMs with external data; central interface for data + LLM

tools.name: Semantic Kernel
tools.notes: Microsoft ecosystem; process framework for durable agents; Python, C#, Java; Azure AI Foundry

tools.name: OpenAI Agents SDK
tools.notes: OpenAI ecosystem; lightweight agent building; tools, guardrails, handoffs

tools.name: Mastra
tools.notes: Modern stack; TypeScript-first; workflow orchestration, memory, evals

tools.name: Pydantic AI
tools.notes: Python developers; type-safe agent development; Pydantic validation; FastAPI integration

tools.name: DSPy
tools.notes: Research/enterprise; programmatic prompt optimization; eliminates manual prompt engineering

tools.name: Haystack
tools.notes: Enterprise; document processing, semantic search; deep vector DB integration; deepset Cloud

tools.name: ZenML
tools.notes: ML pipelines; LangChain & LlamaIndex integrations; orchestrating, experimenting, deploying

tools.name: Temporal
tools.notes: Long-running workflows; automatic retry, state persistence; production-grade for agents; Go-based

tools.name: Langfuse
tools.notes: 11K+ stars; tracing, evals, prompt management; self-hostable; acquired by ClickHouse Jan 2026

tools.name: LangSmith
tools.notes: LangChain ecosystem; LangChain-native tracing, datasets; one-line integration; usage-based

tools.name: MLflow
tools.notes: Linux Foundation; end-to-end GenAI lifecycle; only tool combining open-source, deep agent tracing

tools.name: Helicone
tools.notes: Lightweight; request logging, cost tracking, caching; proxy-based; zero-code integration

tools.name: Comet Opik
tools.notes: Comet ecosystem; eval + tracing; built-in metrics; agent optimizer SDK; free + enterprise

tools.name: AgentOps
tools.notes: Multi-framework; session replay, time-travel debugging; CrewAI, AutoGen, LangChain SDK

tools.name: TruLens
tools.notes: Free; evaluation auditing; moderate tracing; completely free

tools.name: Lunary
tools.notes: Chatbot/RAG teams; LLM apps monitoring, prompt management; self-hostable; EU data center

tools.name: LangWatch
tools.notes: DSPy integration; agent testing, simulation; synthetic conversation testing; voice agent testing

tools.name: Literal AI
tools.notes: Multi-modal; LLM observability + evaluation; prompt templates, versioned deploys, human feedback

tools.name: Future AGI
tools.notes: Enterprise; 50+ eval agents, 18 guardrails; text + voice simulation; traceAI library

tools.name: OpenLIT
tools.notes: OpenTelemetry-native; GenAI + LLM auto-instrumentation; token & cost usage; monitoring LLMs, VectorDBs

tools.name: Maxim AI
tools.notes: Enterprise; SOC2/HIPAA-ready observability; drift detection, audit trails, auto-remediation

tools.name: HoneyHive
tools.notes: Production agents; flexible deployment (SaaS, hybrid, self-hosted); agent lifecycle monitoring

tools.name: Parea AI
tools.notes: AI Engineers; LLM evaluation, observability, prompt playground; version-controlled enhanced prompt

tools.name: Adaline
tools.notes: Production teams; end-to-end prompt lifecycle; versioning, testing, deployment, monitoring

tools.name: PromptHub
tools.notes: Git-like workflow; versioning, branching, reviews; code-review workflow for prompts

tools.name: Humanloop
tools.notes: Prompt editing; polished editing experience; narrower observability; no span-level tracing

tools.name: Confident AI
tools.notes: Git-based; branching, commit, approval workflows; only platform with git-style branching

tools.name: Promptfoo
tools.notes: CI/CD; regression tests, prompt quality; open-source tool for testing & evaluating; CLI and CI/CD

tools.name: PromptMage
tools.notes: Self-hosted; LLM workflows and prompts; simplify creation and management of LLM workflows

tools.name: PromptSite
tools.notes: Local filesystem; version control, tracking, experimentation; lightweight Python library

tools.name: Prompteams
tools.notes: Real-time APIs; version, test, collaborate, retrieve; GitHub-style repos, branches, commits

tools.name: Prompttools
tools.notes: Notebook-friendly; testing and experimenting with prompts; evaluate across different models

tools.name: PromptDX
tools.notes: Markdown/JSX; declarative, extensible, composable prompts; Markdown and JSX approach

tools.name: PromptFoundry
tools.notes: Developers; simple prompt engineering and evaluation; designed for developers building AI apps

tools.name: Wordware
tools.notes: Domain experts + engineers; web-hosted IDE for task-specific AI agents; prompting as programming

tools.name: LangKit
tools.notes: Out-of-the-box; LLM telemetry collection; extracts features and profiles prompts, responses, metadata

tools.name: Langflow
tools.notes: Active community; prototype LangChain flows; drag-and-drop components + chat interface

tools.name: RAGflow
tools.notes: 80.7K+ stars; deep document understanding; complex PDF/table parsing; dedicated RAG backend

tools.name: Botpress
tools.notes: Open-source dialog + LLM; modular; community extensible

tools.name: Rasa
tools.notes: 20K+ stars; 25M+ downloads; open-source + Rasa Studio; developer edition free

tools.name: Voiceflow
tools.notes: Visual agent builder; voice + chat; enterprise teams

tools.name: Relevance AI
tools.notes: Drag-and-drop; zero coding; non-technical users

tools.name: Coze
tools.notes: ByteDance; 100K+ bots; zero-code Bot builder; Doubao model; multi-channel publish

tools.name: BISHENG
tools.notes: China; 'Proudly made by Chinese'; Fortune 500 deployments; open-source alternative to Dify

tools.name: FastGPT
tools.notes: China; RAG-focused; knowledge base QA; workflow orchestration

tools.name: Orq.ai
tools.notes: Europe; LLM app development platform; experiment, evaluate, deploy

tools.name: Langdock
tools.notes: Europe; enterprise LLM platform; compliance-focused; EU AI Act ready

tools.name: Kissflow
tools.notes: India; low-code workflow; AI integration; enterprise BPM

tools.name: DronaHQ
tools.notes: India; low-code app builder; AI workflow automation; enterprise
